archimate:DataObject.name: Translation Item Metadata
archimate:DataObject.documentation:
Definition: Translation Item Metadata refers to structured information that provides descriptive and contextual details about a translation item or unit of content in a translation process. It includes attributes such as the item's source language, target language, content type, translation status, translator information, and any additional metadata that helps define its characteristics and supports the translation workflow. Translation Item Metadata enables efficient management, tracking, and quality control of translation tasks, ensuring accuracy and consistency across multilingual content.
Source: Based on relevant standards for translation services
LOST view: SV-Business Agnostic Metadata
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/TranslationItemMetadataDataObject
ABB name: egovera:TranslationItemMetadataDataObject
EIRA concept: eira:ArchitectureBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2023-11-20
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/TranslationItemMetadataDataObject
Interoperability Layer: Semantic
Specialises: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/DataSetDataObject

properties.value: Translation Item Metadata refers to structured information that provides descriptive and contextual details about a translation item or unit of content in a translation process. It includes attributes such as the item's source language, target language, content type, translation status, translator information, and any additional metadata that helps define its characteristics and supports the translation workflow. Translation Item Metadata enables efficient management, tracking, and quality control of translation tasks, ensuring accuracy and consistency across multilingual content.
Based on relevant standards for translation services
